description.content: Operations for managing and retrieving call data
Retrieves a list of calls that took place during a specified date range. Results are paginated and can be filtered by workspace.

query.description: (Required) The start date and time for the calls filter in ISO-8601 format (e.g., 2021-01-01T00:00:00Z).
(Required) The end date and time for the calls filter in ISO-8601 format (e.g., 2021-12-31T23:59:59Z).
A cursor for pagination. Pass the cursor from the previous response to retrieve the next page of results.
Optional workspace identifier to filter calls by workspace.

response.name: Successful response containing a list of calls.

Retrieves extensive call data including participants, topics, trackers, comments, scorecards, and other analytics. Supports filtering by date range, call IDs, or hosting users. Requires the scope api:calls:read:extensive.

item.name: Gong List calls manually associated with CRM

request.name: Gong List calls manually associated with CRM

description.content: Retrieves a list of calls that were manually associated with CRM objects by users. This endpoint is in beta phase. Results can be filtered by association time.

query.description: Filter by the time the manual association was created, in ISO-8601 format.
A cursor for pagination. Pass the cursor from the previous response to retrieve the next page of results.

response.name: Successful response containing a list of manually associated calls.

Operations for managing call recordings and media
Adds call media (audio or video recording) to a previously created call. Gong accepts recordings in WAV, MP3, MP4, MKV, and FLAC formats up to 1.5GB in size.

variable.description: (Required) The callId returned from the Add New Call request.

formdata.description: (Required) The audio or video file to upload. Supported formats include WAV, MP3, MP4, MKV, and FLAC. Maximum size is 1.5GB.

response.name: Media successfully uploaded.

variable.description: (Required) The callId returned from the Add New Call request.

Operations for retrieving call transcripts
Retrieves transcript data for calls matching the specified filter criteria. Transcripts include speaker identification and timing information.

response.name: Successful response containing call transcripts.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: basic

The Gong Calls API provides endpoints to retrieve, add, and manage call data including recordings, transcripts, and media files. It supports filtering calls by date range, retrieving detailed call analytics, and uploading call recordings from external telephony systems.
